name: feature-pill
title: Feature Pill
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Small rounded pill badge for feature labels, tags, or categories. Supports static and clickable variants with multiple color options.
docs: Pass `label` for the text. Use `variant` for color (default, primary, success, destructive, outline). Set `href` + `renderLink` for clickable pills.
